title: rsyslog bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[8.2506.0-2.0.1]
- Fixes rsyslog segfault during shutdown when relp is configured with TLS [Orabug: 37588023]

[8.2506.0-2]
- imfile: reintroduce deleteStateOnFileMove parameter
  Resolves: RHEL-92262

[8.2506.0-1]
- Rebase to 8.2506.0
- imuxsock: track dropped messages by ratelimiting
  Resolves: RHEL-66274
- man page version update
  Resolves: RHEL-78220
- omfwd: do not hang forever in case of broken TLS handshake
  Resolves: RHEL-67639

[8.2412.0-2]
- Add tmpfiles.d configuration
  Resolves: RHEL-89982
full_text:
[8.2506.0-2.0.1]
- Fixes rsyslog segfault during shutdown when relp is configured with TLS [Orabug: 37588023]

[8.2506.0-2]
- imfile: reintroduce deleteStateOnFileMove parameter
  Resolves: RHEL-92262

[8.2506.0-1]
- Rebase to 8.2506.0
- imuxsock: track dropped messages by ratelimiting
  Resolves: RHEL-66274
- man page version update
  Resolves: RHEL-78220
- omfwd: do not hang forever in case of broken TLS handshake
  Resolves: RHEL-67639

[8.2412.0-2]
- Add tmpfiles.d configuration
  Resolves: RHEL-89982

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20724.html
